title: Ops runbook + guideline-update review cadence + maintenance rotation + outcome tracking
context: Post-delivery sustainment for ewing-survivorship-late-effects: an ops runbook wiring the guideline-update cadence to the staleness fail-safe, a named maintenance rotation, outcome tracking, and a gated process for adding topics/translations. New guideline versions must trigger re-verification and re-dual-sign-off, preserving the HIGH risk-tier discipline.
objective: Write the ops runbook covering deploy, source re-verification, the guideline-update cadence, maintenance rotation, outcome tracking, and a gated expansion/translation process.
acceptanceCriteria: Runbook covers deploy, source re-verification, and the guideline-update cadence wired to the staleness fail-safe (new guideline version -> auto-flag dependent assertions -> re-verify -> re-dual-sign-off)
Named maintenance rotation; outcome tracking (reach via partner, attested usefulness - not engagement)
Documented, dual-gated process for adding new late-effect topics or translations
